title: Make alignment pulse and task triage cadence lifecycle-native
description: v1.9.0 established lifecycle-native project memory updates for the main covered commands. The next gap is to push cadence-level operation forward so alignment pulse, task triage, stale-task handling, and operating self-audit are refreshed naturally through the runtime loop.
triage_notes: Cadence guidance now auto-refreshes after cadence actions; keep TASK-004 open for autonomous trigger policy and follow-through batching [kept-open]
